sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2185" key="ai)glofanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγλο-φᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n2185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">radiant,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.5</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
